data: G. Pugliese Carratelli, «Silloge dell’ epigrafi acrensi», in Akrai, a c. di L. Bernabó Brea (Catania, 1956), 151–81
A "marble" base, damaged in the upper part
Original discovery not recorded; observed in the Iudica collection.
